current_hosted_proof_sources.requirement: Use explicit base URLs, browser context options, and trace/screenshot/video capture for repeatable browser smoke proof.
Retain trace or screenshot evidence when a hosted smoke fails or needs review.
Treat deployed edge functions as a managed runtime surface that must be checked separately from repo-local code.
Use the CLI for local development and project-scoped checks, but require actual project visibility before hosted proof claims.
Bind browser proof to a concrete deployed URL, branch/deploy context, and environment-variable context before external review.
Keep deploy identifiers and production/preview context explicit so smoke evidence can be tied to a specific release surface.

acceptance_gates.evidence: 6 current hosted proof source anchors attached.
acceptance_gates.next_action: Refresh hosted proof anchors when browser, deployment, or Supabase smoke methodology changes.
No script creation needed before owner unblock.
Use the register to record hosted URL, deploy id, logs, screenshots, and redaction status.

acceptance_gates.evidence: local route status=local_route_proof_ready_not_hosted_proof; ready routes=7; runtime errors=0.
acceptance_gates.next_action: Use this only as local baseline; do not claim hosted proof.

acceptance_gates.evidence: access_status=hosted_access_preflight_blocked_project_privileges; cli=true; core_env=true; provider_key=true; target_project_visible=false; functions_access=access_denied_403; secrets_access=access_denied_403; management_access_ready=false; stripe_proof_ready=false.
acceptance_gates.next_action: Owner confirms project ref, grants function/secret management access, provides deploy URL/binding, and supplies Stripe proof values before smoke.

acceptance_gates.evidence: executed=0; passed=0; redaction_verified=0; logs=0; screenshots=0; core_coverage=0/7.
acceptance_gates.next_action: Run hosted access, auth, schema, strategist, insights, retrieval/analyze, pricing, and entitlement smoke after access unblocks.
Keep hosted-live and commercial-ready language blocked until evidence validator passes.
Owner can unblock project access/deploy binding and then rerun hosted preflight.

release_holds.evidence_needed: Intended Supabase project ref is visible to the authenticated CLI/account or corrected in the preflight.
Project-scoped function and secret list commands succeed without exposing secret values.
Stripe proof keys are present by name for owner-approved test/payment proof.
Owner-approved hosted URL plus deploy id or commit binding for the smoke run.
Executed hosted smoke rows with run timestamp, operator, logs, screenshots where relevant, failure class, and redaction verification.
Hosted access, auth/entitlements, schema, strategist, geopolitical insights, retrieval/analyze, and pricing/payment coverage groups pass.
Owner-approved external wording after hosted evidence validation passes.

owner_action_order: Confirm or correct the intended Supabase project ref.
Grant project-scoped function and secret management visibility or provide an owner-generated redacted manifest.
Provide an owner-approved hosted URL and deploy id or commit binding.
Provide Stripe proof values for payment/pricing smoke in test mode.
Rerun hosted access preflight, then run the hosted smoke plan and record logs/screenshots in the evidence register.
Rerun hosted operational proof validation, hosted smoke execution readiness, claim consistency, and commercial confidence before changing hosted-live language.

proves: The repo has hosted smoke scripts, local route baseline proof, evidence-register structure, and claim-boundary checks ready for owner unblock.
Hosted smoke cannot start yet because project access, deploy binding, payment proof values, and hosted evidence are missing.
does_not_prove: Hosted runtime health, production readiness, buyer-safe hosted claims, commercial readiness, or prediction accuracy.
That Browser or Playwright has verified a live hosted URL in this phase.
